# Flow House Miami

### **Downtown Miami / 2025**

41 Stories / 466 Residences of
Studios, 1 to 2 Bedrooms

**698 NE 1st Ave, Miami FL 33132, USA**

Average Price: $940 x SF ($10,118 x M2)

Flow House Miami is a new residential experience in the heart of the new Miami World Center. With fully furnished studio to 2-bedroom configurations, these new residential towers offer a great opportunity to live or invest in one of the fastest growing areas of the city. Well-being, Oneness, connection with the neighborhood and health are the priority of this new residential community. Currently under construction, delivery in mid-2025.

This property has units available for sale starting at $520,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/flowhouse/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

Developed by Adam Neumann

This property has units available for sale starting at $520,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/flowhouse/#contactform) for more information.

**Price Range**

Studios from $520K to $580K

Jr 1 Bedroom from $525K to $570K

1 Bedroom from $507K to $644K

2 Bedrooms from $760K to $875K



## Features

### Building Features

- Fitness center with new Technogym and Rogue equipment along with group classes, turf areas, and open space. Open 24 hours
- Yoga classes
- Rooftop pool
- Meditation and sound healing
- Fitness classes, including power sculpt, bootcamp, spin
- Pet wellness center
- Flow app with wellness weekly classes, and events created to meet your neighbors
- New neighbor welcome events
- Holistic wellness, business, pets and other related events

### Residence Features

- 9-foot-high ceilings
- Gourmet kitchens
- Rain showers in bathrooms
- Earth-based materials and designs
- Custom-crafted furniture for each home
- Sustainable furniture created with love: recycled, reclaimed, and responsibly sourced materials
- Respectful practices for supporting the well-being of furniture makers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/17-Flow-House-Pool.jpg)
